title: Signature Systems Tracksuit
description: Full black heavyweight fleece set with architectural red/white stripes. Premium embroidery. The uniform for humans who execute.
design_prompt: Minimal, bold typography. Red and white geometric stripes. Premium embroidery aesthetic. No graphics, only text-based design.
mockup_scene: Lifestyle shot: person in full tracksuit, mid-morning, gym setting, confident posture. Daylight. Minimalist background.

title: Culture of Discipline Hoodie
description: Heavyweight 400gsm black hoodie. Minimal front, maximum back statement. The visible declaration.
design_prompt: Bold sans-serif typography. Red primary, white accents. Heavy, confident embroidery. Minimal front, powerful back.
mockup_scene: Studio shot: person in hoodie, facing camera slightly, serious expression. Neutral background. Hood up.

title: Do It Anyway Oversized Tee
description: 180gsm heavyweight mineral wash. Minimal front, wearable manifesto back. Entry point to the Culture.
design_prompt: Clean sans-serif. High contrast. Distressed/vintage aesthetic optional. Direct, bold messaging.
mockup_scene: Lifestyle: person wearing tee, natural environment, motion captured. Raw, authentic vibe.

title: System 000 // Foundational Vintage Tee
description: The foundational piece of the D.I.A. culture. System 000 features high-density back graphics with 'Do It Anyway' script layered over Old English 'D.I.A.' branding. Front embroidery detail on left chest. Garment-dyed and reactive-washed for industrial charcoal aesthetic. 100% USA cotton, 7.5 oz Max Heavyweight construction with precision engineering for durability.

design_elements.back: High-density 'Do It Anyway' script (white) layered over 'D.I.A.' Old English (red)

finish: Garment-dyed and reactive-washed for industrial charcoal aesthetic
production_notes: Custom on-demand manufacturing. Processing: 3-5 business days. Reactive wash and garment dye for premium vintage finish.
fulfillment_policy: No returns for buyer's remorse or sizing errors. Replacements only for manufacturing defects within 5 days of delivery.
billing_text: Your bank statement will reflect this transaction as DIA DISCIPLINE*
brand_identity: foundational system piece, culture of discipline
target_audience: Discipline-focused movement, premium vintage enthusiast, minimalist streetwear collector
design_prompt: High-contrast vintage aesthetic. White script 'Do It Anyway' overlaid with red Old English 'D.I.A.' on back. Minimalist front embroidery. Industrial, streetwear-inspired. Maximum visual impact with minimal graphic complexity.
mockup_scene: Studio shot: vintage acid-washed black tee, flat lay showing front and back graphics, neutral background. Professional product photography.
